title: Shalz One Block Survival Create
description: Create Pack used by Shalz in his One block survival Create mod series.
body:
### **What is this?**
This is the modpack that Shalz used in his 'One Block Create Survival' YouTube series! It includes all the mods he used but not the map. It is centered around Create and features
plenty of addons for the mod!

### **Update 2.0!**
I finally updated the pack to reflect the current state of the series. This pack does NOT contain the world save as I did not make it. **This map should work fine:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/oneblock/files/4757258 The problem is I have modified the files to spawn create related blocks in the block gen. I would share the files but since it's not my original datapack I don't feel comfortable doing it. But seriously it takes 6 seconds to do, just open up the folders, click around and add some text :) If I have the time I might make my own custom one in the future... 

Check out the video below to see the modpack in action:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RNn-XEJYvb0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
